name: Rolled Oat Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Low-sodium tamari or soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add oats, tamari or soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon olive oil. Reduce heat to low and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat the remaining olive oil over medium heat. Add diced onion, grated carrots, diced celery, diced red bell peppers, minced garlic, dried oregano, and chopped fresh basil. Sauté for 2 minutes or until vegetables are softened.
4. Stir in the cooked oats mixture and combine well.
5. Chill at least 2 hours or overnight.
6. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Using an ice cream scoop (1/4 cup), portion the mixture into balls. Flatten each ball slightly. Place on a lightly oiled baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, until golden brown.
Nutrition analysis per burger: 97 calories, 4 grams protein, 3 grams fat, 15 grams carbohydrates, no cholesterol, 80 milligrams sodium, 26 percent of calories from fat.
